doc: Declarative spec: the agent SUBSTITUTES the <placeholders> and EXECUTES, doesn't re-compose. MCP paths: ../../../_framework/porter-mcp-calls.md

account.use: the FULL object from the result as <ACCOUNT_OBJECT> (not the id string)

queries.paginate: if total_rows == limit, repeat filtering campaign_name equals <each campaign> and merge (100% coverage)
queries.on_field_error: re-discover via search/get_tool_schema and update this spec (dynamic catalog)

queries.when: only if audience claims in the names need to be verified
queries.note: detects PRESENCE of audience per ad group; the NAME needs a join by criterion id; AGE is a separate demographic resource

process: pass the 'structure' result to process.py → produces inferred convention + deterministic findings (checks A/B/C/D) + theme_suspects for the LLM step
llm_step: the model ONLY judges theme_suspects (semantic keyword↔ad group↔campaign alignment). Everything else comes already resolved by process.py
output: see prompt.md (fixed format, ordered by severity)
